InstituteProfile.title: InstituteProfile
InstituteProfile.description: Represents the core profile and subscription details for the institute, including plan information and website links.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InstituteProfile entity.

name.description: The official name of the institute.

currentPlan.description: The current subscription plan the institute is on (e.g., Basic, Premium). Displayed in Dashboard Overview.

planExpiryDate.description: The date and time when the current subscription plan expires. Displayed in Dashboard Overview.

websiteUrl.description: The URL of the institute's official website. Used for quick links.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email address for the institute.

contactPhoneNumber.description: The primary contact phone number for the institute.

address.description: The physical address of the institute.

Staff.title: Staff
Staff.description: Represents an individual staff member of the institute, used for Staff Management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Staff entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the staff member.

lastName.description: The last name of the staff member.

email.description: The email address of the staff member, used for communication.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the staff member.

dateOfBirth.description: The date of birth of the staff member.

hireDate.description: The date when the staff member was hired.

role.description: The role or position of the staff member within the institute (e.g., Teacher, Administrator, Counselor).

address.description: The residential address of the staff member.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled or previously enrolled at the institute. Used for Upcoming Birthdays and other student management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student, used for communication.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the student.

dateOfBirth.description: The date of birth of the student. Used for the Upcoming Birthdays feature.

admissionDate.description: The date and time when the student was admitted. (Relationship: Student 1:1 Admission)

address.description: The residential address of the student.

LeaveRequest.title: LeaveRequest
LeaveRequest.description: Represents a leave request submitted by a student or staff member.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents a distinct academic or skill-based program offered by the institute. Used for dynamic dropdown options in 'Enquire For Course Or Class'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

name.description: The official name of the course.

description.description: A detailed description of the course content and objectives.

duration.description: The typical duration of the course (e.g., '3 years', '6 months').

fees.description: The standard fees for the course.

definition.description: Represents the core profile and subscription details for an institute.
Represents a leave request from a student or staff member.

params.name: instituteId
params.description: The unique identifier of the institute.

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique identifier of the leave request.
